title: Test code coverage at 68.5% — error paths in storage and edge-case handlers untested
evidence: test_coverage=0.685 from retort.db; api_test.go covers happy paths and basic 404s but does not exercise DB-level error branches in storage.go:49,51,63,89,109,131
suggestion: Add tests that induce storage errors (e.g. closed DB) to cover error-return branches and raise coverage above 80%
